title: Force Graph Studio
description: Build, animate, and export interactive force-directed graphs with physics controls, 5 presets, and 6 themes.
concept: A full-featured graph editor powered by a real-time force simulation. Drop nodes, wire edges, and watch physics arrange the layout automatically. Switch between Force, Circular, and Radial layouts; tune repulsion, spring length, gravity, and damping live; then export your creation as PNG or SVG.
features: Force-directed physics simulation with tunable charge, spring, gravity, damping
Three layout modes: Force, Circular, Radial Tree
Five preset graphs: Social clusters, Binary Tree, Grid, Star, Ring
Connect mode for wiring nodes; context menu for pin/label/color/delete
Export as PNG and SVG; save/load graph from localStorage
Six color themes with live swatch switcher

interaction.mouse: Drag nodes to reposition in force mode
interaction.click: Double-click empty canvas to add a node; right-click node for context menu
interaction.touch: Double-tap to add node; single-tap+drag to move
interaction.keyboard: Delete/Backspace removes hovered node; C toggles connect mode; Escape closes menus
